meta.title: [ms-MY] KiX Connect — Authorise
meta.description: [ms-MY] Authorise a merchant to access your KiX account data. You can revoke at any time.
default_tagline: [ms-MY] is requesting access to your KiX account
intro_prefix: [ms-MY] wants to access the following data:
guarantee.revoke: [ms-MY] You can revoke this authorisation at any time in the KiX app.
guarantee.privacy: [ms-MY] Your password and personal identifiers are never shared with the merchant.
guarantee.scope: [ms-MY] The merchant can only access data within the scopes you approve.
footer.note: [ms-MY] KiX does not sell ads — merchants pay only for results.
scope.profile.title: [ms-MY] View your basic profile
scope.history.title: [ms-MY] View your KiX activity
scope.history.detail: [ms-MY] Games played and rewards claimed (no password data)
scope.location.title: [ms-MY] Notify you when nearby
scope.location.detail: [ms-MY] Used for proximity offers from this merchant
scope.favorites.title: [ms-MY] Understand your preferences
scope.email.title: [ms-MY] Send you email
scope.phone.title: [ms-MY] Send you SMS
scope.insights.title: [ms-MY] Cross-merchant insights
error.not_logged_in: [ms-MY] Please sign in to KiX before authorising.
integrations.title: [ms-MY] External integrations
integrations.sub: [ms-MY] Merchants connect KiX to their existing stack.
